target: desktop 1440px only; mobile QA intentionally skipped
implemented: Officers can be put into rest from the Officers screen when they have command fatigue.
Resting officers recover command fatigue faster during campaign recovery and auto-return when fatigue reaches 0.
Resting officers are inactive for command effects, side-operation candidate filtering, staff effects, and division command effects.
Officers can be manually returned to duty from the Officers screen.
Officer command buttons now use responsive auto-fit columns to avoid crowding.

flow: put a fatigued officer into rest
open Deployment and verify resting officer does not provide active command text

deferred: Political cost for repeated staff/division use remains unimplemented.
Dedicated staff/division replacement recommendation scoring remains future work.
